scenarios.name: Balticconnector Pipeline Damage
scenarios.description: Loss of Balticconnector gas pipeline (7.2 mcm/day). Modeled after Oct 2023 Newnew Polar Bear incident.

scenarios.name: Estlink 2 Severance
scenarios.description: Loss of Estlink 2 submarine cable (650 MW). Modeled after Dec 2024 Eagle S incident.

scenarios.name: LitPol Link Failure
scenarios.description: Loss of sole synchronous AC connection to Continental Europe. Baltics forced into island mode.

scenarios.name: LNG Supply Shock
scenarios.description: Klaipėda LNG terminal offline (maintenance or supply disruption). 3.75 bcm/year capacity lost.

scenarios.name: Multi-Infrastructure Attack
scenarios.description: Simultaneous loss of Estlink 2 and Estlink 1. Modeled after Jan 2026 simultaneous trip (both Estlinks lost).

scenarios.name: Sanctions Escalation
scenarios.description: Major new sanctions tranche affecting Baltic transit trade and shadow fleet operations.
